es.example: Después de tres intentos fallidos, decidió tirar la toalla.
es.exampleTranslation: After three failed attempts, he decided to give up.

it.example: Non gettare la spugna adesso, sei così vicino alla soluzione.
it.exampleTranslation: Don't give up now, you're so close.

bridge.note: Both from boxing. Spanish keeps the towel (as English does); Italian swaps in the sponge, what cutmen historically used.

review.notes: Supersedes the schema-demo duplicate previously at id 0001; that file is removed. Cue drafted by Claude 2026-07-20 from the entry's meaning and bridge — English situational framing, not a language claim, so it needs editorial taste rather than native review. Override freely.

cue: How do you announce that you're giving up?
